Additional credits available at $0.50-$0.60 per credit. Black Friday promotion advertises 40% off annual plans. Free trial includes 5 credits for 7 days.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 15 B2B email credits/month, 5 phone credits/month, 5 direct email credits/month, 100 export limit, limited enrichment automations (3 launches/month, 25 rows per CSV), 3 lead lists, no Zapier integration, no API access

notes: Kaspr uses a hybrid per-seat pricing model with credit-based usage for specific features (B2B emails, phone numbers, direct emails, exports). Free tier includes 15 B2B email credits/month. Annual plans include 25% discount. Enterprise tier available with custom pricing for unlimited credits and advanced features (Intent data, Advanced Salesforce enrichment, Enterprise-level compliance, SSO). Add-on credits available separately at various price points. Organization package available annually with minimum 5 users. Multiple currency options: EUR, GBP, USD.

Non-profits qualify for additional 30% discount on monthly plans.

notes: DealHub does not publicly display pricing on their pricing page. All plans require contacting sales for a custom quote. DealHub AI and AI Contract Search & Insights are mentioned as features but available through custom enterprise packages only. The page lists three main product bundles (CPQ+, CPQ + CLM, Quote-to-Revenue) but no pricing details are provided.

Pricing is per user/month on a seat basis. Basic plan is $29/month or $19/month billed annually (34.48% discount). Team plan is $49/month or $41/month billed annually. Business plan starts at $3,900/year with custom pricing. Free trial includes Team plan features for 14 days. All plans include monthly send limits with per-send overage charges ($0.50-$0.75 per additional send depending on plan). AI writing feature is included across all tiers. Annual discount is calculated from Basic tier: (29-19)/29 = 34.48%.

Business plan includes 1 user base; Enterprise plan includes 10 users minimum ($59/user/month billed annually). Monthly pricing for Business is $39/user when billed monthly vs $35/user when billed annually (10% discount). Annual discount calculated as (39-35)/39 = 10.26%, rounded to 10%. API add-on available with custom pricing. QwilrPay fees: Business 0.09% per transaction, Enterprise 0.05% per transaction. AI Proposal Creator mentioned in product navigation but not detailed in pricing tier features.

Professional tier requires minimum 5 users. eSign tier does not include GetAccept AI features. AI features in Professional tier have usage limits, with unlimited options available as add-ons. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales for pricing. Free trial available but duration not specified. Multiple currency options available (USD, GBP, EUR).

tiers.name: Personal
key_features: Securely store and access all agreements

key_features: Send 100 envelopes per user per year

tiers.name: Business Pro
key_features: Send 100 envelopes per user per year

notes: DocuSign offers 44% savings on annual plans compared to monthly pricing. Personal plan is a flat rate, while Standard and Business Pro are per-user pricing. Enhanced/Enterprise plans require contacting sales. AI-assisted summary is included in Personal plan. Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) plans are available separately with additional AI capabilities like Navigator and Maestro workflows. Add-ons available include SMS delivery ($0.40/delivery) and ID verification ($2.50/attempt) on a pay-as-you-go basis.

No public pricing information available on the page. The page contains only general messaging about flexible pricing and a call-to-action to 'Get Conga pricing' with no specific pricing tiers, prices, or features listed. Contact sales required to obtain pricing details.

Request a Demo option is available.

notes: CaptivateIQ uses a custom per-seat pricing model based on number of payees, compensation plan complexity, and integrations required. No public pricing tiers are displayed. A one-time setup fee is mentioned. Customers must contact sales for custom quotes. ASC-606 reporting is available as an add-on subscription. The company mentions predictive ML capabilities through CaptivateIQ Catalyst product but does not detail AI pricing separately.

Pricing is per user per month, billed annually. Additional connectors available at $250/connector/month. Premium Support available at 30% of Net Price with 24-hour Monday-Friday support. No free trial currently offered. Annual contracts required. Company references AI CRM and AI success in marketing but specific AI features in product are limited to Commission Calculation Insights.

Prices shown are for annual billing. Free trial available. Three packages mentioned in FAQ (Essential, Growth, Premium) but only Growth and Premium are detailed with pricing on the visible page. AI Comp Plan Consult is mentioned as a product offering.
No public pricing information available on this page. The page focuses on demo booking and product features comparison. Pricing requires contacting sales.

Xactly uses a custom pricing model with no public pricing information. Pricing depends on number of employees and plan complexity. No self-service free trial is offered; they provide tailored demos instead. Three main tiers (Core, Plus, Ultimate) are available for Incent product. Additional modules (Plan, Design, Manage, Forecast) and extensions (Intelligence, Benchmarking, Extend) require separate quotes. AI features are included in higher tiers (Core includes AI Assistants, Ultimate includes AI Agents).

No public pricing information available on the page. Performio uses a custom pricing model requiring demo/sales contact. The page mentions 'AI-Powered Incentive Comp' as a product feature but does not provide pricing details or specify whether AI features are included in base pricing or as add-ons. Enterprise-grade solution targeted at large organizations.
